# tfe_hyok_customer_key_version

This data source can be used to retrieve a HYOK customer key version.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the HYOK customer key version.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the key version was created.
- `error` (String) Any error message associated with the HYOK customer key version.
- `key_version` (String) The version number of the customer key version.
- `status` (String) The status of the HYOK customer key version.
- `workspaces_secured` (Number) The number workspaces secured by this customer key version.
